results.description: Remove toLowerCase() — slugify no longer lowercases input
results.output:
▶ TC-UNIT-01 — slugify standard inputs
  ✖ slugify("Hello World") === "hello-world" (1.3863ms)
  ✖ slugify("  Hello World  ") === "hello-world" (0.2223ms)
  ✖ slugify("Hello_world") === "hello-world" (0.1528ms)
  ✖ slugify("Hello-world") === "hello-world" (0.1871ms)
✖ TC-UNIT-01 — slugify standard inputs (2.7552ms)
▶ TC-UNIT-02 — slugify edge: empty / whitespace inputs
  ✔ empty string returns empty string (0.1501ms)
  ✔ whitespace-only string returns empty string after trim (0.0826ms)
✔ TC-UNIT
